src/main/java/com/welt/data/Application..general_idea: Add @ConfigurationPropertiesScan annotation to enable scanning for configuration properties beans.
Add descriptive Javadoc comment to the Application class.
src/main/java/com/welt/data/Application..human_impl:
/**
 * User Data Aggregator Service
 *
 * A production-grade microservice that aggregates user data from external APIs
 * with resilience patterns, caching, and comprehensive observability.
 */

src/main/java/com/welt/data/service/User.general_idea: Replaced a minimal interface stub with a full Spring @Service implementation to handle business logic.
src/main/java/com/welt/data/service/User.human_impl: Changed class definition from `public interface UserDataService` to `public class UserDataService` annotated with `@Service`.

src/main/java/com/welt/data/service/User.general_idea: Introduced constructor injection for the external API client to enable data fetching.
src/main/java/com/welt/data/service/User.human_impl: Added `private final JsonPlaceholderClient apiClient;` and a constructor `public UserDataService(JsonPlaceholderClient apiClient)`.

src/main/java/com/welt/data/service/User.general_idea: Implemented synchronous method using CompletableFuture for parallel API calls, replacing the reactive Mono stub.
src/main/java/com/welt/data/service/User.human_impl: Added `getUserData(Long userId)` using `CompletableFuture.allOf(...).join()` to fetch user and posts in parallel.

src/main/java/com/welt/data/service/User.general_idea: Added a dedicated reactive method using Project Reactor for non-blocking data aggregation.
src/main/java/com/welt/data/service/User.human_impl: Added `getUserDataReactive(Long userId)` using `Mono.zip(...)` to combine reactive streams.

src/main/java/com/welt/data/service/User.general_idea: Applied Spring Cache annotation to cache user data results based on user ID.
src/main/java/com/welt/data/service/User.human_impl: Added `@Cacheable(value = USER_DATA_CACHE, key = "#userId", unless = "#result == null")` to `getUserData`.

src/main/java/com/welt/data/service/User.general_idea: Added Micrometer timing annotations to track service method execution times.
Integrated SLF4J logging for debugging and monitoring service operations.
src/main/java/com/welt/data/service/User.human_impl: Added `private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(UserDataService.class);` and log statements.

src/main/java/com/welt/data/service/User.general_idea: Implemented specific exception handling for user not found and general runtime errors.
src/main/java/com/welt/data/service/User.human_impl: Added `handleCompletionException` method and try-catch blocks throwing `UserNotFoundException`.

src/main/java/com/welt/data/service/User.general_idea: Added convenience methods to fetch only user details or only posts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.0.1 to 3.4.1, which requires Java 17+ and introduces breaking API changes.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin to use the 'release' flag for cross-compilation support in newer JDKs.
Add spring-boot-starter-web dependency for standard MVC web support.
Add spring-boot-starter-validation for Bean Validation support.
Add spring-boot-starter-actuator for production-ready features like health checks.
Add spring-boot-starter-aop to enable Aspect-Oriented Programming for Resilience4j.
Add spring-boot-starter-cache and Caffeine for caching support.
Add Caffeine as the specific caching implementation.
Add springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui for OpenAPI 3 documentation generation.
Add resilience4j-spring-boot3 for circuit breaker and resilience patterns compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Add resilience4j-reactor for reactive resilience patterns.
Add micrometer-registry-prometheus for metrics export to Prometheus.
Add micrometer-tracing-bridge-brave for distributed tracing support.
Add spring-boot-configuration-processor for IDE metadata generation.
Add reactor-test for testing reactive streams.
Add wiremock-standalone for HTTP mocking in tests.
Add archunit-junit5 for architecture testing.
Add awaitility for asynchronous testing assertions.
Configure spring-boot-maven-plugin for Cloud Native Buildpacks image creation.
Add git-commit-id-maven-plugin to generate git information for actuator info endpoint.
Configure maven-surefire-plugin to exclude integration tests from the unit test phase.
Add maven-failsafe-plugin to run integration tests in the verify phase.
Add jacoco-maven-plugin for code coverage reporting and enforcement.
Add Maven profile for development environment.
Add Maven profile for production environment.
Add Maven profile for GraalVM native image compilation.
Add native-maven-plugin to support GraalVM native image builds.

README.md.general_idea: Completely rewrote the README to reflect the modernized Java 21/Spring Boot 3.4 stack, adding documentation for new features like resilience, caching, and observability.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced simple project description with comprehensive markdown including architecture diagrams, API docs, and configuration guides.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replaced the custom ASCII art banner with the standard Spring Boot banner to align with modern project conventions.
src/main/resources/banner.txt.human_impl: Replaced custom ASCII art with the standard Spring Boot banner text.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Added dynamic placeholders for Spring Boot and Java versions to the banner for runtime visibility.
src/main/resources/banner.txt.human_impl: Added '${spring-boot.version}' and '${java.version}' placeholders to the banner text.
